## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss outbound campaign progress, content strategy, and website launch updates.](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Outbound campaign showing positive results with 15.94% positive reply rate; focus on improving open rates (currently 44%)](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [New website launch imminent; confirmed no URL changes to maintain SEO integrity](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting to include Windows-focused articles and experimenting with backlink-oriented pieces on project management tools](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)

## Topics

### Outbound Campaign Performance

  - [Current campaign sending \~1,000 emails/day, capped due to domain limitations](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [15.94% positive reply rate from total replies (11 positive responses)](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Open rate at 44%; aim to improve to 50%+ in next iterations](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Action: Duplicate campaign in Smart Lead to track open rates for B2B responses](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

### Speed-to-Lead Optimization

  - [Identified as a key area for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

### Website Launch & SEO

  - [Sitemap expected to remain unchanged due to consistent URLs](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

### Content Strategy Updates
